titles.title: Mahou Shoujo Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS: Gun Blaze Vengeance
Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance

data.title: Mahou Shoujo Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS: Gun Blaze Vengeance
data.title_japanese: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
title_synonyms: Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
data.synopsis:
Thirty years ago, the sudden appearance of unknown invasive alien lifeforms nearly brought about the end of the world.

Since then, humanity and these creatures, known as Invasion Species, have continued to clash over living territory. Although human safety is barely being maintained, the world remains on the brink of collapse. As the threat of death and destruction lingers, people go about their daily lives by turning away from the constant danger around them. In response, the United Nations establishes EXCEEDS, an organization tasked with investigating and combating threats caused by the Invasion Species.

The story begins in the Far Eastern island nation of Mizuho, where Shiina Kuze, a young hunter who exterminates invasive species, lives on a remote island. Wanting nothing more than a quiet life with her only family—her younger sister, Setsuna—Shiina's routine is disrupted when an unexpected incident occurs, drawing her into a much larger conflict.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: 勇者ちゃんの冒険は終わってしまった!

data.title: Yuusha-chan no Bouken wa Owatteshimatta!
data.title_japanese: 勇者ちゃんの冒険は終わってしまった!
data.synopsis: The heroine who defeated the demon king and brought peace to the world has become arrogant. She now easily defeats the remnants of the demon king's army but can't level up anymore. However, she has disturbing dreams where she is defeated and violated by demons, feeling such real pleasure that it wears down her mind. She discovers the source of these nightmares, but it's too late to resist. Each night, these dreams corrupt her further.

data.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Card Game: The Chronicles
data.title_japanese: Yu-Gi-Oh! CARD GAME THE CHRONICLES
data.synopsis: The stories that lie within the cards come to life...
data.background: Yu-Gi-Oh! Card Game: The Chronicles is a series of monthly anime shorts showcasing Official Card Game-original (i.e. not from the Yu-Gi-Oh! anime/manga) card themes. It is an expansion of the demo reel of the same name released the previous year. The first arc is a retelling of one fight from the lore of the "Sky Striker" theme. The second arc is an adaptation of the The Fallen & The Virtuous storyline's first part, involving the "Dogmatika", "Tri-Brigade", "Springans", and "Branded" themes. The third arc features the "Charmer" theme.

titles.title: 日々は過ぎれど飯うまし

data.title: Hibi wa Sugiredo Meshi Umashi
data.title_japanese: 日々は過ぎれど飯うまし
data.synopsis:
Introverted university student Mako Kawai has a hobby of watching food videos and cooking what she learns from them. She is now a far cry from her energetic self back in elementary school—due to her growing social anxiety, she fears trying new things, such as going to restaurants alone or even making friends.

Enter Shinon Ogawa, one of Mako's childhood friends with whom she reunites in college. Still as extroverted as ever, Shinon quickly adopts Mako into her friend group, which includes the easygoing Tsutsuji Higa and the level-headed Kurea Furutachi. Together, they are planning to start a Food Culture Research Club and invite Mako to join as their fourth member. Though she initially declines, Mako soon realizes that this is her chance to finally brighten up her days, enjoy life surrounded by friends, and eat delicious food with everyone!

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: 猫になりたい田万川くん
Tamagawa Wants to be a Cat

data.title: Neko ni Naritai Tamagawa-kun
data.title_english: Tamagawa Wants to be a Cat
data.title_japanese: 猫になりたい田万川くん
data.synopsis:
For Tamagawa, volunteering at a cat café is the only relief from his stressful job. The manager tells him to, "relax and learn to be spoiled," but he doesn't know what that means until a new customer, Rai Shindou, comes to the café and tells Tamagawa he wants to keep him as a cat! Enter their strange, but fateful relationship. A pure-hearted and soothing romantic comedy.

(Source: Kodansha, translated)

data.title: Futari Solo Camp
data.title_japanese: ふたりソロキャンプ
data.synopsis:
Gen Kinokura is a solitary camper looking for time away from the crowded city to refresh his mind and enjoy nature. But one day, Gen meets Shizuku Kusano at the supposedly empty campsite. A complete beginner at camping, Shizuku tries to settle in with Gen despite his protests. Gen reluctantly gives in once he notices her lackluster preparation.

Offering advice for her next trip, Gen believes their interaction ends on this occasion. However, Shizuku decides to join his future solo outings to learn more about camping. Although no longer on their own, the two set rules on how to camp together, allowing them a give-and-take experience while still relishing the atmosphere in a form of solitude.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Futari Solo Camp was released on Blu-ray in two box sets by Pony Canyon from October 29, 2025, to January 28, 2026.
